title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">🔹</font> Connecting: What parts of this co
content:
🔹 Connecting: What parts of this course will influence how you engage with media/literature in the future?
🔹 Exploratory: Where do you see yourself in 5-10 years, and how will your ability to analyze texts & arguments help you?

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages self-awareness.
• Allows students to assess their growth.
• Provides a capstone to their intellectual journey.

5️⃣ Grading Flexibility Between Pathways

Each pathway has equal grading weight but different grading rubrics.
